images.label: blood_web_coffin
images.prompt: A lone figure in a high-collared grey trench coat stands before a black lacquered coffin on fog-draped青石 alley stones; his right eye glows with eerie cyan light, left eye shows desiccated brown crust; intricate crimson filaments float mid-air like living capillaries, weaving a glowing red web over the coffin lid; cyberpunk-meets-ancient-folk-horror aesthetic, cinematic low-angle composition, chiaroscuro lighting with mist-scattered neon-blue ambient glow and sharp crimson filament highlights.

images.label: hallucination_chamber
images.prompt: A spectral vision overlay: dim candlelit chamber with twelve purple-lit bronze lamps arranged in a circle; a well-dressed man kneels, forehead pressed to a black scabbard engraved with a crescent moon; behind him, a tall figure in silver-chain-embroidered black robe raises a translucent bone scalpel toward his skull; anime-sci-fi hybrid style, split-focus composition blending real-world alley fog with hallucinatory layer, volumetric lighting with deep indigo shadows and ethereal gold-crimson rim light on skin and blade.
